ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with both Original (page 1) and Copy (pages 2-3) versions. Page 4 is an embedded invoice within the certificate file.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF invoice from Humphree AB. Single page. Good quality.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number S230516 and order SO038159. Invoice file (Document B) bears invoice number S230516 and order SO038159. Consignor Humphree AB matches invoice issuer Humphree AB.
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate file also contains an embedded copy of the invoice on page 4 — this is supplementary material per rule 8.5.0. Verification is performed against the separate invoice file (Document B). Original certificate (page 1) used for verification per rule 8.5.

criteria_met: Certificate invoice reference S230516 matches invoice number S230516
Certificate consignor Humphree AB matches invoice issuer Humphree AB
Certificate consignee Sinerji Denizcilik matches invoice Sell-to/Bill-to party

search_results.location: Header/branding area — large 'HUMPHREE®' logo at top of page

checkpoints.certificate_value: Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, SE-417 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Humphree AB' in all invoice files and pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Humphree AB' found in invoice footer address block: 'Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, 417 05 GÖTEBORG'. Also found as 'HUMPHREE®' in header branding.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Sweden for consignor. Invoice footer shows 'Registered Office Göteborg' and VAT Registration No. SE556616762201 (SE prefix confirms Sweden).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via indirect identifier (VAT SE prefix per 4.1.2.1).

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice footer and header
Land verification via VAT SE prefix

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Humphree AB' is expressly identified in the invoice footer address block ('Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, 417 05 GÖTEBORG') and in the header branding ('HUMPHREE®'). The invoice is issued by Humphree AB. Country Sweden is confirmed via the SE-prefix in the VAT Registration No. SE556616762201. Name and country both verified. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, SE-417 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: footer 'Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, 417 05 GÖTEBORG' + header 'HUMPHREE®' + VAT 'SE556616762201'. Normalization: case, ® symbol ignored. Rule 4.1.0 satisfied — consignor name found expressly in invoice. Rule 4.1.2.1 satisfied — SE VAT prefix confirms Sweden. Result: MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd., Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Türkiye
checkpoints.invoice_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti, Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Turkey (Bill-to Address)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'Bill-to Address' field with 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti'. This is the primary factoring field for consignee verification.

Certificate: 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' vs Invoice: 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti'. The difference is 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti'. 'Sti' is part of the Turkish legal form 'Limited Şirketi' (Ltd. Şti. / Ltd. Sti.). This is a legal form abbreviation variation per 4.1.3.6.
Certificate: 'Türkiye'. Invoice Bill-to: 'Istanbul-Turkey'. Türkiye and Turkey are the same country (standard vs local name). Normalization accepted.

rules_applied.rule_description: Bill-to field used as primary consignee identification
Legal form abbreviation — 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti' (Turkish limited company form)
Country normalization — Türkiye/Turkey are the same country

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' matches invoice Bill-to 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti'. The only difference is 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti' — 'Sti' (Şirketi) is the Turkish legal form suffix, acceptable per rule 4.1.3.6 (legal form abbreviation). Address matches: Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul. Country 'Türkiye' normalizes to 'Turkey'. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' + 'Türkiye'. Invoice Bill-to: 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti' + 'Turkey'. Core name 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic.' is identical. 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti' is legal form variation (Turkish Ltd. Şti. = Limited Şirketi). Country: Türkiye = Turkey. All conditions met. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 1- Interceptor Trim System Crank Kit HE, L=83mm(metal) (P/N 020955), Qty. 8Pcs; 2-Long std Shaft sleeve kit (max transom 144mm) (Metal) (H, HA, HE, HAE) (P/N 020264), Qty. 8Pcs; 3-Shaft short, L=155(metal), Qty. 4Pcs; 4-Screw delta PT40x20 A4 (P/N 020161), Qty. 20Pcs; 5-Screw delta PT50x12 A4 (P/N 020162), Qty. 40Pcs
checkpoints.invoice_value: 1 - Interceptor Trim System Crank Kit HE, L=83mm(metal) (P/N 020955) 8 Pcs; 2 - Long std Shaft sleeve kit (max transom 144mm) (Metal) (H, HA, HE, HAE) (P/N 020264) 8 Pcs; 3 - Shaft short, L=155(metal) 4 Pcs; 4 - Screw delta PT40x20 A4 (P/N 020161) 20 Pcs; 5 - Screw delta PT50x12 A4 (P/N 020162) 40 Pcs

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists P/N: 020955, 020264, 020161, 020162. Invoice lists P/N: 020955, 020264, 020161, 020162. All four article numbers match exactly.

All five item descriptions in the certificate can be identified in the invoice after normalization of spacing and formatting. Item 1: 'Interceptor Trim System Crank Kit HE, L=83mm(metal)' matches. Item 2: 'Long std Shaft sleeve kit (max transom 144mm) (Metal) (H, HA, HE, HAE)' matches. Item 3: 'Shaft short, L=155(metal)' matches. Item 4: 'Screw delta PT40x20 A4' matches. Item 5: 'Screw delta PT50x12 A4' matches.
Certificate references 'Invoice Nr: S230516, Order Nr. SO038159'. Invoice number S230516 matches exactly. Order number SO038159 matches exactly.

rules_applied.rule_description: Article number matching — all P/N numbers match exactly
Controlled text matching — all descriptions identifiable

checkpoints.motivation: Verification via Priority 1 (article numbers): All four P/N numbers in the certificate (020955, 020264, 020161, 020162) are exactly identified in the invoice. Additionally, via Priority 2 (text matching): all five item descriptions match after normalization of spacing/formatting. Certificate also references Invoice Nr S230516 and Order Nr SO038159, both exactly matching the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Article numbers: cert 020955 = inv 020955 ✓, cert 020264 = inv 020264 ✓, cert 020161 = inv 020161 ✓, cert 020162 = inv 020162 ✓. Descriptions: all five items textually identical after normalization. Invoice reference: S230516 matches, SO038159 matches. Note: item 3 in cert lacks P/N but description 'Shaft short, L=155(metal)' matches exactly. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '16kg Gross weight'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.
Certificate: 16 kg Gross weight. Invoice: 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Numeric value 16 matches exactly. Unit KG matches exactly.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — numeric value and unit identified in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies 'Gross weight'. Invoice states 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG' without explicit GW/NW category. However, certificate has only ONE weight value (16kg GW) and invoice has only ONE total weight value (16KG) with no alternative weight. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value without category in invoice, no contradicting alternative → MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Box 7 value (16kg Gross weight) is verification-grounding
Occurrence check — numeric value 16 and unit KG identified in invoice
Single weight value, no contradicting alternative weight in invoice

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate Box 7 states '16kg Gross weight'. Invoice states 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Numeric value 16 matches exactly. Unit KG matches. Certificate specifies Gross weight; invoice does not specify GW/NW but has only one total weight (16KG) with no alternative weight value. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, this constitutes MATCH. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate: '16kg Gross weight' from Box 7. Invoice: 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Value: 16 = 16 ✓. Unit: kg = KG ✓. Weight category: certificate says 'Gross weight', invoice says 'TOTAL WEIGHT' without GW/NW. Only one weight value exists in both documents. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2 — single value, no contradicting alternative → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit origin statement: 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'. This is a 'Made in' expression per rule 4.5.1.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SWEDEN'. After case normalization: 'sweden' = 'sweden'. Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Origin identified via 'Goods are made in SWEDEN' expression

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states origin 'Sweden' in Box 3. Invoice contains explicit origin statement 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'. After case normalization, these are identical. Single origin country, no mixed origins. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'. Normalization: case only → 'sweden' = 'sweden'. Exact match. No additional or contradicting origin information in invoice. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. No LC-related field labels or terms identified.

Certificate file (Document A) contains Original certificate (page 1), Copy certificates (pages 2-3), and embedded invoice (page 4). Invoice file (Document B) contains the separate invoice. Per rule 8.5.0, verification uses certificate from Document A page 1 and invoice from Document B page 1. Embedded invoice on page 4 of Document A is supplementary material.

All three criteria met: (1) Certificate invoice ref S230516 = invoice number S230516, (2) Certificate consignor Humphree AB = invoice issuer Humphree AB, (3) Certificate consignee Sinerji Denizcilik identified in invoice Bill-to.
Humphree AB found in invoice footer address block and as HUMPHREE® in header branding.
Humphree AB found expressly in invoice footer. Direct issuer match — no need for sequential testing 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Country verification via indirect identifier (VAT SE prefix)
rule_evaluation_log.details: VAT Registration No. SE556616762201 — SE prefix confirms Sweden.
Invoice has Bill-to Address field with Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti. Used as primary consignee identification.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Legal form abbreviation — Ltd. vs Ltd. Sti
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: 'Ltd.' Invoice: 'Ltd. Sti'. 'Sti' (Şirketi) is Turkish legal form suffix. Core name identical.
All four P/N numbers (020955, 020264, 020161, 020162) match exactly between certificate and invoice.
All five item descriptions match after normalization.
Invoice Nr S230516 and Order Nr SO038159 both match exactly.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Weight category — single value without category
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: Gross weight. Invoice: TOTAL WEIGHT (no GW/NW specified). Only one weight value in each document. Per point 2: MATCH.
'Goods are made in SWEDEN' — explicit Made in expression.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee name mismatch due to 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The difference between 'Ltd.' and 'Ltd. Sti' is a legal form abbreviation variation. 'Sti' (Şirketi) is the Turkish word for 'Company' in the full legal form 'Limited Şirketi'. Per rule 4.1.3.6, variations in legal form abbreviation are acceptable when the core name is identical, which it is ('Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic.').

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice date mismatch — certificate issued 2026-02-06 vs invoice date 2026-02-05
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The certificate issue date (2026-02-06) differs from the invoice date (2026-02-05) by one day. The certificate does not reference an invoice date in Box 6 — it references only 'Invoice Nr: S230516'. The certificate issue date is not the same as the invoice date reference. No invoice date is stated in the certificate's goods description, so there is no date to compare. The invoice number S230516 matches exactly. No conflict.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Weight category mismatch — certificate says 'Gross weight' but invoice says 'TOTAL WEIGHT' without GW/NW
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has one single weight value (16 kg GW), invoice has one single total weight (16 KG) with no contradicting alternative weight value. When only one weight value exists and no contradicting alternative is present, this is MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Humphree AB bekräftas i fakturan. Mottagaren Sinerji Denizcilik matchar fakturans Bill-to-adress. Varubeskrivning, artikelnummer, kvantitet (16 kg) och ursprungsland Sverige stämmer alla överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Humphree AB is the invoice issuer (found in header, footer, and address block). Consignee Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. matches Bill-to party (minor legal form variation: 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti'). Goods description matches on all article numbers and descriptions. Quantity 16 kg Gross Weight matches invoice TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG. Origin Sweden matches 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'.
non_blocking_observations: Certificate file contains both Original and Copy versions — Original (page 1) used for verification.
Certificate file also contains an embedded invoice copy on page 4 — not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
Minor legal form variation in consignee name: 'Ltd.' (certificate) vs 'Ltd. Sti' (invoice) — accepted per rule 4.1.3.6.
Certificate issue date (2026-02-06) is one day after invoice date (2026-02-05) — this is the certificate issue date, not a referenced invoice date, so no conflict.

sections.certificate_value: Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, SE-417 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, 417 05 GÖTEBORG (footer); HUMPHREE® (header); VAT SE556616762201
sections.rule_applied: Konsignörens namn identifierat direkt i fakturans sidfot och sidhuvud. Land verifierat via SE-prefix i momsnummer.
sections.motivation: Humphree AB återfinns uttryckligen i fakturans adressblock (sidfot) och som varumärke i sidhuvudet. Land Sverige bekräftas via SE-prefix i VAT-nummer SE556616762201. Namn och land verifierade.

sections.certificate_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd., Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Türkiye
sections.invoice_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti, Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Turkey (Bill-to Address)
sections.rule_applied: Bill-to-fält i fakturan använt som primär mottagaridentifiering. Variation i bolagsform (Ltd. vs Ltd. Sti) accepterad.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' matchar fakturans Bill-to 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti'. Skillnaden 'Ltd.' vs 'Ltd. Sti' avser turkisk bolagsform (Limited Şirketi) och accepteras. Adress och land (Türkiye/Turkey) överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: Invoice Nr: S230516, Order Nr. SO038159; 5 artikelrader med P/N 020955, 020264, 020161, 020162
sections.invoice_value: Invoice No. S230516, Order No. SO038159; 5 artikelrader med P/N 020955, 020264, 020161, 020162
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummermatchning (Prioritet 1) och kontrollerad textmatchning (Prioritet 2). Fakturareferens verifierad.
sections.motivation: Alla fyra artikelnummer (P/N) i certifikatet (020955, 020264, 020161, 020162) kan identifieras exakt i fakturan. Alla fem artikelbeskrivningar matchar efter normalisering. Fakturanummer S230516 och ordernummer SO038159 bekräftade.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll av numeriskt värde och enhet. Enda viktvärde utan motstridande alternativ.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 7 anger '16kg Gross weight'. Fakturan anger 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Numeriskt värde 16 och enhet KG matchar exakt. Enda viktvärdet i båda dokumenten utan motstridande alternativ.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsland identifierat via 'Made in'-uttryck i fakturan. Normalisering av versaler/gemener.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' (Box 3) bekräftas av fakturans uttryckliga angivelse 'Goods are made in SWEDEN'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler.

output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: All applicable checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85. Lowest: 0.96 (consignee).
output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 checkpoints MATCH → comparison_result IDENTICAL. No MISMATCH found. No motivation-status contradiction detected.
